items.title: Voice Agent Turn-Taking: Stop Live AI Calls From Talking Over Users
items.description:
Voice agents do not usually fail because the model is “not smart enough.” They fail in the awkward half-second where the user pauses, breathes, corrects themselves, or interrupts while the AI is still talking.

That tiny moment decides whether the product feels useful or robotic.

If

items.title: The Hard Part of a Global Birth-Chart Calculator Was Time
items.description:
A birth-chart form looks simple: ask for a date, time, and place, then calculate.

The interface may be simple. The input is not.

1992-11-01 01:30 does not identify one universal instant. It is a wall-clock reading that only becomes meaningful after you resolve the place

items.title: I Couldn’t Fix My LLM Costs Until I Measured Tokens Per Feature
items.description:
My LLM bill kept growing, so I did what seemed obvious: I looked for a cheaper model.

That helped a little, but it didn't explain why the bill was growing.

The dashboard could tell me how many tokens the application used. It couldn't tell me what those tokens were doing.
